creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
ale@ recently committed a different (admittedly more up to date) update:
_____

Update to 2018.3.2 release and enable native file watcher by default.

Approved by:	maintainer timeout (15 days)
_____

I am not opposed to the commit but the committer didn't mention any PR number or phabricator revision.

Is bugzilla still the proper way to submit changes, or am I wasting my time here?
